# makefile.txt
# Build system for PriorityQueue (Binary Min-Heap) ADT — IP2
#
# Targets:
#   module   - compile PriorityQueue.o from .h and .cpp
#   demo     - build the demo executable
#   rundemo  - run the demo
#   test     - build the test executable
#   runtest  - run the tests (output to stdout and log.txt)
#   clean    - remove all generated files
#   rebuild  - clean and rebuild everything from scratch
#
# Usage:  make -f makefile.txt <target>

CXX      = g++
CXXFLAGS = -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -pedantic
MODULE   = PriorityQueue

.PHONY: module demo rundemo test runtest clean rebuild

# a) Build the module .o from .h and .cpp
module: $(MODULE).o

$(MODULE).o: $(MODULE).cpp $(MODULE).h
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) -c $(MODULE).cpp -o $(MODULE).o

# b) Build demo
demo: demo_app

demo_app: demo.cpp $(MODULE).o
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) demo.cpp $(MODULE).o -o demo_app

# c) Run demo
rundemo: demo_app
	./demo_app

# d) Build test
test: test_app

test_app: test.cpp $(MODULE).o
	$(CXX) $(CXXFLAGS) test.cpp $(MODULE).o -o test_app

# e) Run test
runtest: test_app
	./test_app

# f) Clean everything
clean:
	rm -f $(MODULE).o demo_app test_app log.txt

# g) Rebuild from scratch
rebuild: clean module demo test
